column1: # KC868-A6 OTA partition table (4 MB flash).
# firmware can write an update into the inactive slot
# records which slot the bootloader should boot next. espflash writes
# the USB image into ota_0 (first app partition; no factory present)
# and a blank `otadata` makes the IDF bootloader pick ota_0 on first
# boot. From then on OTA ping-pongs ota_0 <-> ota_1.
# App image is ~750 KB today; 1.5 MB slots leave generous headroom.
# Offsets are explicit so the layout never silently shifts.
